description:
Advances: specled.mix_tasks

Deliverable:
Add lib/mix/tasks/spec.dedup_realized_by.ex (module Mix.Tasks.Spec.DedupRealizedBy). Mirrors mix spec.suggest_binding ergonomics. Flags: --root, --fail-on-dups. NO --write flag. Loads specs via SpecLedEx.detect_spec_dir/1 + SpecLedEx.index/2. Computes duplicates via the shared SpecLedEx.Validator.RealizedByDedupe.duplicates/1 helper. Prints proposal blocks per subject including a '# already implied by implementation' comment on each removal. Exit code: 0 by default; non-zero with --fail-on-dups when any subject has duplicates.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: new test/specled_ex/mix/tasks/spec_dedup_realized_by_test.exs covers proposal block format (single subject, multi-subject ordering), --fail-on-dups semantics, no-dups-clean-exit, '# already implied by implementation' comment present, no --write flag exists.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: spec requirements specled.tasks.dedup_realized_by_proposal, dedup_realized_by_no_write, dedup_realized_by_exit_code, dedup_realized_by_shared_seam.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/validator/** (S7)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/** (already shipped)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.validate.ex (S7)
- .spec/**
Allowed touches:
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.dedup_realized_by.ex (new)
- test/specled_ex/mix/tasks/spec_dedup_realized_by_test.exs (new)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do NOT add a --write flag.
- Do NOT emit findings from the task itself; the validator handles findings.
- Do NOT duplicate the duplicate-detection logic; call RealizedByDedupe.duplicates/1.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

Tests added (test/specled_ex/mix/tasks/spec_dedup_realized_by_test.exs, 11 tests):
- proposal block format: subject id, realized_by:/api_boundary: scaffold, entries
- proposal block format: each removal line carries `# already implied by implementation`
- multi-subject ordering (sorted by subject id, deterministic)
- exit-code: default exit 0 even when dups present
- exit-code: clean-exit message when no dups ("No realized_by duplications found.")
- exit-code: --fail-on-dups raises Mix.Error when any subject has dups
- exit-code: --fail-on-dups still exits 0 when no subject has dups
- no --write: source does not declare a `write:` OptionParser key
- no --write: task writes nothing to disk (file set unchanged before/after)
- shared seam: source calls `RealizedByDedupe.duplicates`
- shared seam: end-to-end agreement — validator findings and task output report
  the same entry set on the same fixture

Verification stubs flipped: NONE in this ticket. The four spec-verification
covers entries for these requirements remain `execute: false` in
.spec/specs/mix_tasks.spec.md because the ticket lists `.spec/**` under
Out of Scope (S9 owns the spec/ADR doc updates per the epic DAG).

Smoke check (end-to-end): `mix spec.dedup_realized_by` on this repo
prints proposal blocks for the 5 subjects with cross-tier duplicates
visible from `mix spec.validate`'s `realized_by_redundant_dup` warnings;
exit 0 by default, exit 1 with `--fail-on-dups`.

Test suite: `mix test` — 2 properties, 747 tests, 0 failures.
`mix spec.validate`: 11 pre-existing findings (binding/realized_by/mix_tasks
dups + 3 missing-tag errors on realized_by spec), all reproducible on the
bare epic-branch HEAD before this ticket's changes — no regressions
introduced; the Out of Scope (.spec/**, validator/**, realization/**,
spec.validate.ex) was honored.

Summary: Adds `Mix.Tasks.Spec.DedupRealizedBy.run/1` that loads the spec
index, computes cross-tier duplicates per subject via the shared
`SpecLedEx.Validator.RealizedByDedupe.duplicates/1` helper, and prints a
deterministic per-subject YAML proposal block annotating each removal
with `# already implied by implementation`. No `--write` flag exists; agents
apply edits via their own tooling, mirroring `mix spec.suggest_binding`.
